functions.name: llmling_provider_llm.register_provider
documentation: Register this provider with LLMling.

modules.name: llmling_provider_llm.provider
documentation: LLM library provider implementation.

functions.name: llmling_provider_llm.provider.test_provider
documentation: Test the LLMLib provider.

classes.name: llmling_provider_llm.provider.LLMLibProvider

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.provider.LLMLibProvider.__init__
documentation: Initialize provider with configuration.

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.provider.LLMLibProvider._get_capabilities
documentation: Get model capabilities.

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.provider.LLMLibProvider._prepare_messages
documentation: Convert messages to llm library format.

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.provider.LLMLibProvider._extract_tool_calls
documentation: Extract tool calls from response.

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.provider.LLMLibProvider.complete
documentation: Generate a completion for the messages.

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.provider.LLMLibProvider.complete_stream
documentation: Generate a streaming completion for the messages.
Provider implementation using the llm library.

modules.name: llmling_provider_llm.client
documentation: Client for the llm library.

functions.name: llmling_provider_llm.client._get_cached_model
documentation: Get or create cached model instance, falling back to sync if needed.

functions.name: llmling_provider_llm.client._detect_model_capabilities
documentation: Detect model capabilities from instance.

functions.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.get_model_info
documentation: Get model capabilities (cached).

functions.name: llmling_provider_llm.client._prepare_attachments
documentation: Extract attachments from messages.

functions.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.complete
documentation: Execute completion.

functions.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.stream
documentation: Stream completions, falling back to single response for sync models.

classes.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.AsyncModelProtocol
documentation: Protocol defining the required async model interface.

classes.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.SyncModelAdapter

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.SyncModelAdapter.__init__
documentation: Initialize the adapter with a sync model.

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.SyncModelAdapter.prompt
documentation: Execute the prompt asynchronously by wrapping the sync model.
Adapter to make sync models behave like async models.

classes.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.DummyResponse

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.DummyResponse.__init__
documentation: Initialize with content string.

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.DummyResponse.text
documentation: Return the content string (as async method).

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.DummyResponse.__aiter__
documentation: Make this class async iterable.

methods.name: llmling_provider_llm.client.DummyResponse.__anext__
documentation: Yield the entire content as a single chunk.
Simple Response-like object for string outputs.
